facts.subject: forge surfaces CLI command signature and modes
facts.value: forge surfaces [--json] [path] [--types]

facts.subject: forge surfaces --json list mode output format
facts.value: {"surfaces": [{"key": "<surface-key>", "type": "<surface-type>"}]}

facts.subject: forge surfaces --json query mode output format
facts.value: [{"key": "<surface-key>", "type": "<surface-type>"}]; no match returns []

facts.subject: forge surfaces --json --types output format
facts.value: {"types": ["<type1>", "<type2>"]}

facts.subject: forge surfaces --json error format when surfaces not configured
facts.value: stderr: {"error": "no surface configured; run `forge init` to configure surfaces"}; exit 1

facts.subject: Task struct SurfaceKey field
facts.value: SurfaceKey string; JSON tag: surface-key,omitempty

facts.subject: Task struct SurfaceType field
facts.value: SurfaceType string; JSON tag: surface-type,omitempty

facts.subject: Task struct Scope field removal
facts.value: Scope field deleted, no backward compatibility layer

facts.subject: Fixed set of surface types
facts.value: web, api, cli, tui, mobile

facts.subject: Surface-key character validation pattern
facts.value: alphanumeric, dash, underscore only: [a-zA-Z0-9_-]

facts.subject: Probe retry configuration for web/api surfaces
facts.value: max 3 retries, 30-second intervals, total timeout 90s

facts.subject: Probe retry log format
facts.value: [probe] [retry <current>/<max>] <url> -- <reason>

facts.subject: Exit code semantics for run-tests orchestration
facts.value: 0=success, 1=retryable, 2=blocking

facts.subject: Test state file path and purpose
facts.value: .forge/test-state.json; tracks PID of background processes; cleaned up on teardown

facts.subject: Web/api surface orchestration sequence
facts.value: dev (background) -> probe -> test -> teardown

facts.subject: CLI/TUI surface orchestration sequence
facts.value: build -> dev -> test (no probe, no teardown)

facts.subject: Mobile surface orchestration sequence
facts.value: test-setup -> dev -> test -> teardown

facts.subject: User-customized recipe protection mechanism
facts.value: recipes marked with # user-customized comment are preserved unless --force-regenerate flag is passed

facts.subject: Number of prompt templates requiring variable update
facts.value: 18 templates with {{SCOPE}} -> {{SURFACE_KEY}}, 1 template with {{TEST_TYPE_ARG}}, 3 skill templates

facts.subject: Legacy scope migration check function
facts.value: CheckLegacyScope(tasks []Task) error; scans for scope field without surface-key, returns blocking error

facts.subject: Surface rule files for init-justfile
facts.value: skills/init-justfile/rules/surfaces/{web,api,cli,tui,mobile}.md

facts.subject: Surface rule files for run-tests
facts.value: skills/run-tests/rules/surfaces/{web,api,cli,tui,mobile}.md

facts.subject: Dead code functions to be removed after migration
facts.value: extractTestTypeArg(), genScriptBases() in prompt.go

facts.subject: Config.yaml surfaces field format
facts.value: map<string, string> mapping surface-key to surface-type, e.g., {admin-panel: web}

facts.subject: PipelineRegistry gen-scripts node expansion mode
facts.value: per-surface-key; ID template: T-test-gen-scripts-{surface-key}; interleaved rewiring in Phase 2

facts.subject: PipelineRegistry test-run node expansion mode
facts.value: per-surface-key; ID template: T-test-run-{surface-key}; depends on own gen-scripts (interleaved)

facts.subject: Interleaved dependency rewiring for multi-surface gen-scripts and test-run
facts.value: Phase 2 of GenerateTestTasks: gen-scripts[i>0] depends on test-run[i-1] of previous surface; test-run depends on own surface gen-scripts; only applies when NOT single-surface

facts.subject: Single-surface task generation behavior
facts.value: isSingleSurface returns true for scalar form (key '.') or map with exactly 1 entry; strips -{surface-key} suffix from ID; generates exactly 2 tasks: gen-scripts + run-tests

facts.subject: Execution order resolution logic
facts.value: explicit execution-order used as-is; otherwise default priority: api > web > cli > tui > mobile; single surface returns nil

facts.subject: Task index file format and location
facts.value: docs/features/<slug>/tasks/index.json; JSON with Feature, Tasks map, StatusEnum, PriorityEnum

facts.subject: Task status enumeration values
facts.value: pending, in_progress, completed, blocked, suspended, skipped, rejected

facts.subject: forge task add for fix tasks with --block-source
facts.value: forge task add --type <fix-type> --title <title> --source-task-id <ID> --block-source; creates fix task, blocks source, adds fix as dependency of source

facts.subject: Task dependency validation in AddTask
facts.value: all dependencies must exist in the index; wildcard deps (e.g. 1.x) expand to matching business task IDs

facts.subject: forge worktree start command signature
facts.value: forge worktree start [slug] [--source-branch branch] [--no-launch] [--interactive/-i]; max 1 arg; source: cmd_start.go:17-31

facts.subject: forge worktree remove command signature
facts.value: forge worktree remove <slug> [--hard] [--force]; exactly 1 arg; source: cmd_remove.go:17-33

facts.subject: Worktree start idempotent directory check logic
facts.value: os.Stat(targetDir) succeeds + IsDir -> validates .git file exists -> enters existing; source: cmd_start.go:107-143

facts.subject: Corrupted worktree detection logic
facts.value: directory exists but .git file missing -> stderr: 'error: worktree directory exists but is not a valid git worktree' + hint: 'forge worktree remove <slug>'; exit non-zero; source: cmd_start.go:114-118

facts.subject: --source-branch ignored warning on existing worktree
facts.value: stderr: 'warning: worktree already exists, ignoring --source-branch'; source: cmd_start.go:121-123

facts.subject: Entering existing worktree message
facts.value: stderr: 'entering existing worktree: <slug>'; source: cmd_start.go:125

facts.subject: Created new worktree message
facts.value: stderr: 'created new worktree: <slug>'; source: cmd_start.go:237

facts.subject: --no-launch output for existing worktree
facts.value: stdout: 'worktree path: <resolvedDir>'; exit 0; no claude session; source: cmd_start.go:128-131

facts.subject: --no-launch output for new worktree
facts.value: stdout: 'worktree created at <targetDir>'; exit 0; no claude session; source: cmd_start.go:240-243

facts.subject: Worktree includes config field
facts.value: WorktreeConfig.Includes []string yaml:includes; source: config.go:72-75

facts.subject: Includes file copying behavior
facts.value: copyIncludesToWorktree copies files from projectRoot to worktreeDir; creates parent dirs; overwrites existing; only during creation (not re-entry); source: helpers.go:152-174

facts.subject: Includes path validation rules
facts.value: rejects absolute paths, Windows absolute paths, paths containing '..'; verifies file exists in projectRoot; source: helpers.go:120-150

facts.subject: Worktree branch resolution three-layer strategy
facts.value: Layer 1: local branch exists -> resume; Layer 2: remote branch exists -> create from remote; Layer 3: new branch from source-branch or HEAD; source: cmd_start.go:168-227

facts.subject: Worktree remove not found error
facts.value: targetDir does not exist -> AIError NOT_FOUND 'Worktree not found: <path>'; source: cmd_remove.go:63

facts.subject: Worktree remove unpushed commits check
facts.value: checks unpushed commits before removal; blocks without --force; stderr: 'error: branch has N unpushed commit(s)'; source: cmd_remove.go:79-87

facts.subject: Interactive mode TTY requirement
facts.value: -i flag requires real terminal (TTY); non-TTY -> stderr: 'error: interactive mode requires a terminal (TTY)'; source: cmd_start.go:49-52

facts.subject: Interactive mode when no unfinished items exist
facts.value: stdout: 'No unfinished proposals or features found.' + 'Create one with: forge proposal <slug> or forge feature <slug>'; exit 0; source: cmd_start.go:55-59

facts.subject: Git worktree list porcelain parsing
facts.value: git worktree list --porcelain; ParsePorcelainWorktrees returns []WorktreeEntry with Path, HEAD, Branch, IsMain; source: worktree_list.go:25-77
